beats.prompt: Each correlation is minus one over root 2. Combine four of them: the CHSH score is 2 root 2 — about 2.83. That is 41 percent above the classical ceiling.

beats.prompt: Aspect measured 2.697 in 1982. Loophole-free tests in 2015 confirmed 2.828 at ten standard deviations. Local hidden variables are ruled out, not just unlikely.
